notes: API envelope — total number of bills returned; no ontology mapping needed
API envelope — number of result objects returned; no ontology mapping needed
API-generated response date; no ontology equivalent
API sort key (integer); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (integer); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (slug string); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (slug string); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (integer); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (integer); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (slug string); no ontology equivalent
API sort key (slug string); no ontology equivalent
Bill URI is the IRI of the eli-dl:DraftLegislationWork instance; also typed eli:LegalResource. No property needed — the IRI is the subject node.
Number component of the bill identifier (e.g. "60"). Range xsd:string. Annotated in legislation.owl.ttl. The compound year/number identifier is carried by eli:id_local.
Year component of the bill identifier. Range xsd:integer (xsd:gYear ideal but outside OWL 2 DL datatype map). Applied to the eli-dl:DraftLegislationWork instance.
Human-readable string ("Public" / "Private"); covered by billTypeURI. No separate mapping needed.

Maps to :PublicBill or :PrivateBill eli-dl:ProcessType individuals in legislation.owl.ttl. Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeProcess instance. Annotated in legislation.owl.ttl. Replaces former :hasBillType.
Short title of the Bill in English. Range plain literal with @en language tag. Applied to eli-dl:DraftLegislationWork.
Short title of the Bill in Irish. Same property as shortTitleEn with @ga language tag.
Long (enacting) title of the Bill in English. Annotated in legislation.owl.ttl as "Long title of a Bill".
Long title in Irish. Same property with @ga language tag.
Human-readable string (e.g. "Enacted"); covered by statusURI. No separate mapping needed.
URI value maps to a :BillStatusTable individual (e.g. :EnactedBill). Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeProcess instance. Status individuals defined in legislation.owl.ttl.
Human-readable string ("Government" / "Private Member"); covered by sourceURI. No separate mapping needed.

URI is the IRI of a named individual in agents.owl.ttl typed :Government or :PrivateMember. Named individuals <.../def/bill-source/government> and <.../def/bill-source/private-member> added in agents.owl.ttl.
Human-readable label on the agents:House named individual; not stored separately on the bill.
IRI of the originating house individual (e.g. <.../house/dail>). Domain eli-dl:DraftLegislationWork; range agents:House. Distinct from eli-dl:was_submitted_by which carries the submitting agent.
Human-readable string ("Presented" / "Introduced"); covered by methodURI. No separate mapping needed.
URI maps to a :BillDelivery named individual (e.g. :Presentation / :Introduction) from the :BillDeliveryTable concept scheme. Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity representing the delivery event.
ISO 8601 datetime with timezone. Range xsd:dateTime. Applied to eli-dl:DraftLegislationWork instances. Annotated in legislation.owl.ttl.
Points to the most recently completed eli-dl:LegislativeActivity (stage). Annotated in legislation.owl.ttl for Oireachtas usage. The nested event fields are mapped individually below under stages[].

Act URI is the IRI of the eli:LegalResource instance. Linked from the DraftLegislationWork via eli:basis_for (annotated in legislation.owl.ttl). No property needed — it is the subject node of the Act resource.
Number component of the act identifier (e.g. "18"). Same property as bill.billNo but applied to the Act eli:LegalResource instance.
Year component of the act identifier. Same property as bill.billYear but applied to the Act eli:LegalResource instance.
Short title of the Act in English. Applied to the Act eli:LegalResource instance.
Short title of the Act in Irish (@ga language tag).
Long (enacting) title of the Act in English.
Long title of the Act in Irish (@ga language tag).
Date and time the President signed the Bill into law under Article 25. Range xsd:dateTime. Sub-property of eli:date_document. Domain eli:LegalResource.
ELI URI of the Act on the Irish Statute Book (www.irishstatutebook.ie). Sub-property of dct:relation. Domain eli:LegalResource.

Each amendment list is an instance of eli-dl:AmendmentToDraftLegislationWork linked from the DraftLegislationWork via eli-dl:has_part. The URI in this subfield resolves to the amendment type definition and drives :hasAmendmentListType.
URI resolves to :NumberedAmendmentList or :UnnumberedAmendmentList from :AmendmentListTypeTable. Set on the eli-dl:AmendmentToDraftLegislationWork instance.
Human-readable label on the agents:House named individual; not stored separately on the amendment list.
:InChamber links the amendment list activity to the agents:House (Dáil or Seanad) where the amendment was tabled.
Date of the amendment list. Range xsd:date. Applied to the eli-dl:AmendmentToDraftLegislationWork instance.
URI of the PDF format rendition. Modelled as eli:uri_schema on an eli:Format instance attached to the eli:LegalExpression via eli:has_format. Media type application/pdf.
URI of the XML format rendition (null if not published). Same pattern as pdf.uri but for application/xml.
Human-readable display label for the amendment list. Applied to the eli-dl:AmendmentToDraftLegislationWork instance.
Label on the linked stage LegislativeActivity; not stored separately on the amendment list.

IRI of the stage eli-dl:LegislativeActivity that this amendment list was tabled at. Links back to the stage instance; no new property needed — use the activity IRI as object of eli-dl:related_to or the stage IRI directly.

The stage number within a single house at which the amendment list was tabled (e.g. 3 = Committee Stage; 4 = Report Stage). Range xsd:positiveInteger. Applied to eli-dl:AmendmentToDraftLegislationWork.
Human-readable label on the agents:House named individual; not stored on the debate record separately.

House or committee chamber in which the debate took place. Set on the :JournalEvent / eli-dl:LegislativeActivity representing the debate. For committee debates the URI is the generic def/committee placeholder — see :hasCommitteeType in agents.owl.ttl for the specific committee type.
Date of the debate. Range xsd:date. Applied to the debate activity.
Internal identifier of the debate section within the Official Report record. No ontology equivalent defined. Relevant when debates.owl.ttl is developed.
Human-readable label for the debate session (stage name + bill title). Applied to the debate activity instance.
AKN URI of the debate record. Would become the IRI of a :JournalEvent instance in debates.owl.ttl when that module is developed. Currently deferred.
Short code (e.g. "dail"); derivable from chamber.uri. No separate mapping needed.
Human-readable label on the agents:House named individual.
House in which the bill lifecycle event occurred. Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance. May be null for cross-house events (e.g. Enacted).
Date(s) of the lifecycle event. Range xsd:date. Multiple dates indicate repeat occurrences (e.g. Published appears on initiation and on signing).
URI maps to a :BillEvent named individual in the :BillEventTable concept scheme (e.g. :Published or :Enacted) defined in events.owl.ttl.
Human-readable label for the lifecycle event. Applied to the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.
IRI of the lifecycle event eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance. No property needed — the IRI is the subject node.
Chamber of the most recent stage; null for the final Enacted stage. Same mapping as stages[].event.chamber.uri.
Date(s) of the most recent stage activity. Same mapping as stages[].event.dates[].date.
HouseTerm in which the most recent stage occurred; null for the Enacted stage. Same mapping as stages[].event.house.uri.
Integer giving the cross-house sequential order of the stage (1–10). Range xsd:positiveInteger. Applied to the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.
Human-readable stage name (e.g. "Enacted"). Applied to the LegislativeActivity instance.
Boolean indicating whether the stage is complete. Range xsd:boolean. Applied to the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.

String value "Enacted" maps to :EnactedBill via eli-dl:process_status on the eli-dl:LegislativeProcess (not a BillEventOutcome individual). For all other stages stageOutcome is null. See annotation on eli-dl:process_status in legislation.owl.ttl.
URI maps to a :BillStage named individual (e.g. :FirstStage or the enacted-stage concept) from events.owl.ttl. Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.
IRI of the stage eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance. No property needed.
IRI of the related document eli:LegalExpression instance. Linked from the DraftLegislationWork via eli:has_expression or via eli-dl:has_part depending on document type.
Maps to :Errata / :Gluais / :ExplanatoryMemo eli:ResourceType individuals defined in legislation.owl.ttl. Applied at Work level. The JSON value is a string code ("errata" / "gluais" / "memo").
Publication date of the related document expression. Range xsd:date. Applied to the eli:LegalExpression instance.
BCP 47 language code of the related document (e.g. "eng" / "mul"). Range xsd:language. Applied to the eli:LegalExpression instance.
Human-readable label for the related document expression (e.g. "Explanatory Memorandum"). Applied to the eli:LegalExpression instance.
PDF rendition URI. Modelled as eli:uri_schema on an eli:Format instance (media type application/pdf) attached via eli:has_format to the eli:LegalExpression.
XML rendition URI (null if not published). Same pattern as pdf.uri for media type application/xml.
Human-readable name of the sponsoring Member. Applied to the agents:Member instance when the member IRI is resolved.

IRI of the sponsoring agents:Member (foaf:Person). Accessed via eli-dl:had_participation on the LegislativeProcess → eli-dl:Participation → eli-dl:participant. Often null in the API for Government bills where the sponsor is identified by role.
Human-readable label of the ministerial or member role under which the bill was sponsored (e.g. "Minister for Finance"). Applied to the Participation or role instance.
IRI of the specific ministerial role. Null in the Finance Bill record. When populated would point to a members:MinisterRole individual; role IRI pattern not yet defined. Deferred.
Boolean flag indicating the primary sponsor. Range xsd:boolean. Applied to the eli-dl:Participation instance. True for the minister/member in whose name the bill was presented.
IRI of the stage eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance. No property needed — the IRI is the subject node.
Short code (e.g. "dail" / "seanad"); derivable from chamber.uri. No separate mapping needed.
Human-readable label on the agents:House named individual.
House in which this stage occurred. Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance. May be null for the Enacted stage.
Date(s) of the stage. Range xsd:date. Multiple entries indicate a stage spanning more than one day (e.g. Committee Stage resumed).
IRI of the HouseTerm (e.g. <.../house/dail/34>) identifying the specific numbered Dáil or Seanad sitting. The HouseTerm instance should additionally be typed eli-dl:ParliamentaryTerm.
Short code (e.g. "dail"); derivable from house.uri. No separate mapping needed.
Duplicate of houseCode; derivable from house.uri.
Fixed value "house"; derivable from class type. No mapping needed.
Ordinal number of the Dáil or Seanad (e.g. "34"); encoded in the house.uri IRI path. No separate mapping needed.
Human-readable label on the HouseTerm individual (e.g. "34th Dáil").
Integer giving the canonical cross-house sequential order of this stage (1 = First Stage Dáil … 10 = Enacted). Range xsd:positiveInteger. Applied to the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.
Human-readable stage name. Applied to the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.
Boolean; true if the stage is concluded. Range xsd:boolean. Applied to the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.

String value "Enacted" on the final stage maps to :EnactedBill via eli-dl:process_status on the LegislativeProcess. All other stages have stageOutcome null. Not a BillEventOutcome individual. See annotation in legislation.owl.ttl.
URI maps to a :BillStage named individual in events.owl.ttl (e.g. :FirstStage / :SecondStage). Set on the eli-dl:LegislativeActivity instance.

IRI of the bill version eli:LegalExpression instance. The path segment (initiated / ver_a / ver_b) implies the version; the corresponding named individual (:AsInitiated / :VersionA / :VersionB) is used via eli:version property.

String value "bill" or "act". Per mapping_proposals §5: apply at Work level only. A value of "act" signals the presence of a separate eli:LegalResource (Act) Work linked via eli:basis_for; the expression itself does not carry eli:type_document. See annotation on eli:type_document in legislation.owl.ttl.
Date of this expression of the bill. Range xsd:date. Applied to the eli:LegalExpression instance.
BCP 47 language code of the version (e.g. "eng"). Range xsd:language. Applied to the eli:LegalExpression instance.
Human-readable label for the version (e.g. "As Initiated" / "As amended in Committee"). Applied to the eli:LegalExpression instance.
PDF rendition URI. Modelled as eli:uri_schema on an eli:Format instance (media type application/pdf) attached via eli:has_format to the eli:LegalExpression.
XML rendition URI (null for most bill versions). Same pattern as pdf.uri for application/xml.
